title: format_receipt_timestamp: UTC day boundary confuses non-UTC users
description: The function compares calendar dates in UTC. A user in UTC-8 sends a message at 11pm local time = 07:00 next day UTC. The message displays as 'Yesterday' locally even though the user sent it 'today'. The doc comment does not mention UTC-only behavior. Will generate user issues. Fix: add a note to the doc that all timestamps are treated as UTC and the caller is responsible for timezone conversion.
